title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS (9) and (29), UNDER "AF. MlNDORO ORIENTAL." TITLE A, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6716 / 53 OG No. 17, 5520 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1775, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEMS (9) and (29), UNDER "AF. MlNDORO ORIENTAL." TITLE A, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representative of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items (9) and (29) under

"af.

Mindoro Oriental," Title A, Section one of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred are amended to read as follows:

"(9)

Construction of Pinamalayan Central School .........................

P 4,000.00

"(29)

(

a

) Aid to PTA for the construction of Bulalacao Central School ......................

1,000.00

"(b)

Aid to PTA for the completion of Ranso Barrio School, Pinamalayan ......................

1,000.00

"(c)

Aid to PTA for the completion of San Agustin School Shop, Naujan .......................

500.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
